booking.name: Full Name
booking.notesPlaceholder: Child seat, meet & greet sign, extra stops...

errors.returnRequired: Return date is required for round trips

items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: We recommend booking at least 2 hours ahead. For airport pickups, 24 hours is ideal so we can plan around your flight. Last-minute requests are sometimes possible — just reach out on WhatsApp.
Yes. The price you see when booking is exactly what you pay — no surge pricing, no hidden airport fees, no extras. We quote it, you confirm it, that's the price.

items.q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.a: We monitor your flight in real time. If it's delayed, we automatically adjust the pickup time at no extra charge. You don't need to call us — we're already tracking it.
Yes. Just mention 'child seat' (and the child's age if possible) in the Special Requests field when booking. We'll have the appropriate seat fitted and ready.
Yes. Your driver speaks fluent English, is professionally trained, and is discreet. We hold every ride to the same standard.

items.q: Can I cancel or modify my booking?
items.a: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup. Need to change the time or address? Contact us anytime before that on WhatsApp or email and we'll sort it quickly.

items.q: Do you only operate from Bucharest?
items.a: We're based in Bucharest and cover all destinations within roughly 300 km — Brașov, Sinaia, Sibiu, Constanța, Bran, and more. Have a different route in mind? Contact us.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: You can pay in cash on arrival (EUR or RON) or by card. Payment details are confirmed when we confirm your booking.

success.title: Booking Confirmed!
success.subtitle: We'll confirm your booking within 1 hour via email and WhatsApp.
